mapper.select:
SELECT M.MENU_ID , M.MENU_UPPER_ID , M.MENU_NM , M.MENU_URI , M.MENU_SORT , M.MENU_LEVEL , M.MENU_ICON , M.MENU_USE , M.REGIST_ID , M.UPDT_ID , M.REGIST_DT , M.UPDT_DT , M.MENU_CODE , M.MENU_TY , M.MENU_DC , M.LEVEL_AUTHOR FROM SWC_MENU M
M.MENU_ID = UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND M.MENU_CODE = UPPER(#{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND M.MENU_USE = UPPER(#{use, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
ORDER BY M.MENU_LEVEL , M.MENU_SORT
mapper.delete: WITH MENU_TREE AS ( SELECT M.MENU_ID , M.MENU_UPPER_ID FROM SWC_MENU M WHERE M.MENU_ID = UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) UNION ALL SELECT M.MENU_ID , M.MENU_UPPER_ID FROM SWC_MENU M INNER JOIN MENU_TREE MT ON MT.MENU_ID = M.MENU_UPPER_ID ) DELETE FROM SWC_AUTHOR_MENU WHERE MENU_ID IN ( SELECT MENU_ID FROM MENU_TREE )

DELETE FROM SWC_MENU WHERE MENU_ID IN ( WITH RECURSIVE MENU_TREE AS ( SELECT M.MENU_ID , M.MENU_UPPER_ID FROM SWC_MENU M WHERE M.MENU_ID = #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} UNION ALL SELECT M.MENU_ID , M.MENU_UPPER_ID FROM SWC_MENU M INNER JOIN MENU_TREE MT ON MT.MENU_ID = M.MENU_UPPER_ID ) SELECT MENU_ID FROM MENU_TREE )
